paper_focus.title: Evaluation of the elastic modulus of steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To quantify the influence of chemical composition and equilibrium phase constituents on the elastic modulus of steels via statistical regression and thermodynamic modeling, enabling composition-based prediction.
main_process_variables: chemical composition (mass content of Cr, Mo, Si, Mn, Cu, Ni, C, N, Nb, Ti)
phase composition (equilibrium phase fractions from Thermo-Calc)
temperature (room temperature, elevated temperatures up to 400°C)
